theme_and_archetype.archetype: Electric & Neon combined with Organic/Earthy Stone
theme_and_archetype.description: Neon Shamanism - A fusion of ancient tribal/sacred geometry with cyberpunk/neon futurism. Deep, textured obsidian and void backgrounds accented by high-contrast neon glowing lines (red, electric blue, green, yellow). Uses layered elevations, glassmorphism, and soft glows rather than heavy drop shadows.

typography.fallback_fonts: Outfit for headings, JetBrains Mono for technical data/numbers
rules: CRITICAL: Do not use Inter, Roboto, Arial, or Space Grotesk.
Headlines (Unbounded) MUST use tight letter spacing: `tracking-tight`.
Overlines/Labels (Chivo) MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (`tracking-[0.2em]`).
Line Height: Tight (`leading-none`) for headers, loose (`leading-relaxed`) for body.
Variable Fonts: Utilize font weights creatively (e.g., Ultra-light vs Black) for contrast.
Never use pure black (#000000). Always use tinted void black (#050505).
Surfaces must use a 1px border (`border-[#333333]`) to separate them from the background, avoiding muddy gray transparency.
Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio against dark backgrounds.

layout_strategy.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid blended with heavy asymmetry for non-game screens.
layout_strategy.spacing_scale: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12) mixed with dense technical data blocks.

page_specifics.game_screen: Strict grid hierarchy. Left Panel (Stats: col-span-2), Center (SVG Board: col-span-7), Right Panel (Abilities: col-span-3). Bottom (Actions). Total 12 cols.
page_specifics.home_lobby: Bento Grid layout. Overlapping abstract geometry. Hero section spans full width, Lobby creation card spans 4 cols.

rules: Avoid centered-equal-spacing AI-slop layouts. Use heavy asymmetry.
Use subgrid where necessary to align inner elements perfectly.

game_board_svg_guidelines.lines: Neon grid style. Stroke color `#333333`, stroke width `2px`. Winning paths or active lines pulse with `cyan` or `red`.

pieces.tiger: Radius 18px. Fill `#121212`. Stroke `#FF3366` 3px. Outer glow `drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255,51,102,0.8))`.
pieces.goat: Radius 14px. Fill `#121212`. Stroke `#00E5FF` 2px. Outer glow `drop-shadow(0 0 6px rgba(0,229,255,0.8))`.

states.valid_move: Node radius 10px, Fill `#39FF14`, opacity 0.6. Pulsing animation.

animation_timings.piece_movement: Spring physics or `ease-out`, duration 400ms. Keep it snappy.
animation_timings.capture_fade: Opacity fade out with a slight upward translate, duration 300ms.
animation_timings.ability_pulse: Keyframe animation scaling from 1 to 1.3 and back, duration 600ms, repeat 2 times.
animation_timings.turn_indicator: Continuous slow pulse (duration 2000ms, infinite) on the active player's avatar.

component_usage_map.Button: Neon aesthetic. Primary buttons use dark background with 1px solid accent color (e.g. Electric Blue) and glowing box-shadow on hover. Avoid flat filled colored buttons.
component_usage_map.Dialog: For Room Code entry. Glassmorphism `backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#050505]/80`. 1px border `#333333`.
component_usage_map.Tabs: For Lobby (Create vs Join). Minimalist tab trigger, underline active state instead of filled background. Use accent color (Neon Green or Electric Blue) for active state.
component_usage_map.Card: For Leaderboard and Profile stats. 1px border, dark flat background, no soft drop shadows. Sharp or slightly rounded (max 8px) corners.
component_usage_map.Avatar: Glowing border based on team (Red for tiger, Blue for goat).
component_usage_map.Input: Terminal/Cyberpunk style. Transparent background, border bottom only, or 1px border all around. Focus state rings neon cyan.
component_usage_map.Sonner: Dark mode forced. Border left colored with the event type (Red for capture, Yellow for ability, Green for win).

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.

image_urls.description: Dark alleyway with glowing circle at night (Hero Background for Home/Lobby)
Black marble with white veins (Profile / Leaderboard background texture)
Abstract geometric shapes formed by neon strip lights in dark setting (Card / Lobby decorative image)
